steps.instruction: This step list should be replaced by the site adapter.
Open the FastPeopleSearch removal page.
Enter the privacy email address.
Enter the full name to search for the record.
Select the state associated with the listing.
Search for the matching FastPeopleSearch record.
Select the first matching record for removal.
Choose the default privacy removal reason.
Submit the FastPeopleSearch removal request.

})();
